name: studio.get_billing_overview
description: Read the Actium Studio billing overview for an account: plan tier, seat count, monthly spend, invoice status, usage breakdown by category.
whenToUse: Generate a billing summary for an operator: plan, seats, current-period spend, and usage breakdown.
Forecasting: compare usage_by_category against last period to flag categories trending over budget.
Invoice diagnosis: answer 'is my account in good standing' by surfacing invoice_status.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants the current credit balance only — use studio.get_credit_balance; billing_overview is broader and higher-latency.
Caller wants to pay an outstanding invoice or change the plan tier — out of scope; operator console handles billing writes.
Caller has no account_id and no site_id — billing data requires at least one scoping key.
